zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Somery於大約1319年出生在英國維爾爾斯文頓時，他的父親Sir Roger de Somery36歲，母親Lady Lettie Damarell26歲。他於1336年與Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Somery于大约1319年出生在英国維爾爾斯文頓时，他的父亲Sir Roger de Somery36岁，母亲Lady Lettie Damarell26岁。他于1336年与Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Somery was born about 1319, in Swindon, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Roger de Somery, was 36 and his mother, Lady Lettie Damarell, was 26. He married Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery in 1336, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1358, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Somery est né environ 1319, à Swindon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Somery, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Lettie Damarell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery en 1336, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1358, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Somery um 1319 in Swindon, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de Somery 36 und seine Mutter Lady Lettie Damarell 26. Er hat 1336 in Shropshire, England Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1358 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Somery è nato il circa 1319 nel Swindon, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de Somery, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Lettie Damarell, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery nel 1336, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1358, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Someryが約1319年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスウィンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Someryは36歳，母Lady Lettie Damarellは26歳であった。1336年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLady Cecilla Seymour de Someryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Somery(이)가 대략 1319년 영국 윌츠히르 스윈던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de Somery(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Lettie Damarell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1336년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Somery nasceu aproximadamente 1319, em Swindon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de Somery, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Lettie Damarell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery em 1336, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1358, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Somery родился около 1319 г. в местности свиндон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de Somery было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Lettie Damarell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery в 1336 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1358 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Somery nació aproximadamente 1319, en Swindon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de Somery, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Lettie Damarell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Cecilla Seymour de Somery en 1336, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1358, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
